FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]

) AS [p0]

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]

SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[Description], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[LowStockThreshold], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [c].[Id], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[Description], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[Name], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[Id], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[DisplayOrder], [p1].[ImageUrl], [p1].[IsPrimary], [p1].[ProductId], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [r].[Id], [r].[Comment], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ProductId], [r].[Rating], [r].[UpdatedAt], [r].[UserId]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p1] ON [p0].[Id] = [p1].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r] ON [p0].[Id] = [r].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [p0].[CreatedAt] DESC, [p0].[Id], [c].[Id], [p1].[Id]

SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[Description], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[LowStockThreshold], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [c].[Id], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[Description], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[Name], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[Id], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[DisplayOrder], [p1].[ImageUrl], [p1].[IsPrimary], [p1].[ProductId], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [r].[Id], [r].[Comment], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ProductId], [r].[Rating], [r].[UpdatedAt], [r].[UserId]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Price] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p1] ON [p0].[Id] = [p1].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r] ON [p0].[Id] = [r].[ProductId]

SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[Description], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[LowStockThreshold], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [c].[Id], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[Description], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[Name], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[Id], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[DisplayOrder], [p1].[ImageUrl], [p1].[IsPrimary], [p1].[ProductId], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [r].[Id], [r].[Comment], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ProductId], [r].[Rating], [r].[UpdatedAt], [r].[UserId]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Price] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p1] ON [p0].[Id] = [p1].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r] ON [p0].[Id] = [r].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [p0].[Price] DESC, [p0].[Id], [c].[Id], [p1].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT [o].[DiscountAmount], [o].[TotalAmount], DATEPART(year, [o].[OrderDate]) AS [Year], DATEPART(month, [o].[OrderDate]) AS [Month]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[Status] = N'Delivered' AND [o].[OrderDate] >= @twelveMonthsAgo
) AS [o0]

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]

) AS [p0]

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]

    WHERE [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]

LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p1] ON [p0].[Id] = [p1].[ProductId]

2026-02-23 15:25:20.306 +07:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (33ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32), @p1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[Description], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[LowStockThreshold], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [c].[Id], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[Description], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[Name], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[Id], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[DisplayOrder], [p1].[ImageUrl], [p1].[IsPrimary], [p1].[ProductId], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [r].[Id], [r].[Comment], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ProductId], [r].[Rating], [r].[UpdatedAt], [r].[UserId]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Price] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p1] ON [p0].[Id] = [p1].[ProductId]

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]

) AS [p0]

SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[Description], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[LowStockThreshold], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [c].[Id], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[Description], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[Name], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[Id], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[DisplayOrder], [p1].[ImageUrl], [p1].[IsPrimary], [p1].[ProductId], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [r].[Id], [r].[Comment], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ProductId], [r].[Rating], [r].[UpdatedAt], [r].[UserId]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Price] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p1] ON [p0].[Id] = [p1].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r] ON [p0].[Id] = [r].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [p0].[Price] DESC, [p0].[Id], [c].[Id], [p1].[Id]

    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]

SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[Description], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[LowStockThreshold], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [c].[Id], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[Description], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[Name], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[Id], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[DisplayOrder], [p1].[ImageUrl], [p1].[IsPrimary], [p1].[ProductId], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [r].[Id], [r].[Comment], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ProductId], [r].[Rating], [r].[UpdatedAt], [r].[UserId]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]

) AS [p0]

SELECT [o0].[Year], [o0].[Month], COALESCE(SUM([o0].[TotalAmount] - [o0].[DiscountAmount]), 0.0) AS [Revenue], COUNT(*) AS [OrderCount]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[DiscountAmount], [o].[TotalAmount], DATEPART(year, [o].[OrderDate]) AS [Year], DATEPART(month, [o].[OrderDate]) AS [Month]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[Status] = N'Delivered' AND [o].[OrderDate] >= @twelveMonthsAgo
) AS [o0]
GROUP BY [o0].[Year], [o0].[Month]
ORDER BY [o0].[Year], [o0].[Month]
